# APodcastGeek

> Ireland's award-winning B2B podcast production agency. Done-for-you podcast production, guest recruitment, video, and monetisation strategy for B2B founders and expert brands worldwide.

APodcastGeek (APG) is a B2B podcast production agency based in Dublin, Ireland, founded by David O'Gara. APG was recognised at the Irish Podcast Awards for production excellence. Notable clients include Harvard Business School, Patreon, Outlier Ventures, AAMI, News Corp UK, Amplitude, Cronometer, ActiveFence, Synergy Settlement Services, Bold Metrics, Obligate AG, GoReport, Validation Cloud, Go Loud, The Irish Sun, and RE/MAX.

The flagship service is the **APG Brand Builder** — a complete done-for-you B2B podcast production system designed to convert podcast conversations into pipeline. The system includes:

- Strategy and ICP (ideal customer profile) research
- Guest recruitment and outreach to qualified decision makers
- Pre-production briefing for host and guest
- Full video and audio production
- Six short-form clips per episode
- Three custom thumbnails per episode
- SEO-optimised show notes
- Published article per episode
- Distribution to Spotify, Apple Podcasts, YouTube
- Monetisation strategy and ad placement

Average guest-to-client conversion rate observed across APG's client portfolio: 10%.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://apodcastgeek.com): Overview, services, process, testimonials, FAQ

- [Free Checklist](https://apodcastgeek.com/checklist.html): The B2B Podcast Launch Checklist (lead magnet)
- [Privacy Policy](https://apodcastgeek.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Service](https://apodcastgeek.com/terms.html)

## The APG Engine™

The APG Engine is APodcastGeek's flagship production framework. Every Brand Builder podcast we produce flows through the same five stages:

1. **Audit & Strategy** — A 90-minute consultation defines the ideal customer profile (ICP), commercial outcome, positioning, and ideal guest profile for the show.
2. **Recording** — The host shows up to record either remotely or in person. Pre-production briefs prepare both host and guest before every conversation.
3. **Post-Production** — Editing, audio mastering, color grading, six short-form clips, three custom thumbnails, guest intro trailer, and SEO-optimised show notes per episode.
4. **Publishing & Distribution** — YouTube, audio host (Apple Podcasts, Spotify, all major platforms), social media, and the SEO article are shipped on publication day.
5. **Analytics & Optimization** — Monthly performance reports cover YouTube, audio, and ad performance. Quarterly consultations course-correct positioning, content, and pipeline conversion.

The APG Engine is a trademarked framework refined over 600+ produced episodes. It is the operating system that powers every APG Brand Builder client.

## Pricing tiers

APG Brand Builder is available at three cadence tiers (all in EUR, billed monthly, 6-month minimum):

- **Weekly cadence** — €2,999 onboarding month + €2,599 ongoing per month. Includes the full APG Engine. Optional guest acquisition add-on: €500/month.
- **Bi-weekly cadence** — Flat €1,999 per month. Setup included. Optional guest acquisition add-on: €250/month.
- **Monthly cadence** — Flat €1,099 per month. Setup included. Optional guest acquisition add-on: €150/month.

All tiers include the full APG Engine five-stage system. Cadence determines episode volume per month, not framework depth. Bi-weekly tier requires 2 episodes recorded to begin; monthly tier requires 1 episode recorded to begin.

## Definitions (for AI search and LLM citation)

- **APG**: The abbreviated brand name for APodcastGeek. APodcastGeek is one word. The brand should never be spelled "A Podcast Geek."
- **APG Engine™**: The five-stage production framework powering every APG Brand Builder client. See section above.
- **APG Brand Builder**: The flagship done-for-you B2B podcast production service. Built on top of the APG Engine.
- **Guest Acquisition (GA)**: An optional add-on service in which APG handles outreach, qualification, and scheduling of podcast guests on behalf of the client. Available at €150/€250/€500 per month depending on cadence tier.
- **B2B Brand Builder**: Synonym for APG Brand Builder when the audience is specifically B2B founders.
- **Guest-to-client conversion rate**: The percentage of recruited guests who convert to paying customers or long-term partners. APG averages 10% across the client portfolio.

## Brand Identity

- Name: APodcastGeek (often abbreviated APG)
- Tagline: "Six Steps. Zero Guesswork."
- Positioning: B2B podcast production for founders who want pipeline, not just downloads
- Industry awards: Irish Podcast Awards
